entityTypes.name: pipeline_route_audit
entityTypes.description: Per-route health + cost-relevant signal snapshot captured by the analyzer sub-agent. The recommender consumes these to generate pipeline_cost_recommendation records. The analyzer also produces a __workspace_rollup__ row per run summarising aggregate counts. Field set is constrained to what the runtime built-ins actually expose (no per-window event counts, no per-route error rates, no sink configuration details).

route_id.description: Pipeline route id, or __workspace_rollup__ / __no_routes__ / __truncated__ for synthetic rows

events_processed_lifetime.description: Lifetime event count from adl_get_route_status. Single number; window-based counts are not exposed by the runtime today.

days_since_last_event.description: Computed by the analyzer from last_event_at; null if last_event_at is null

lifetime_volume_bucket.description: Bucket relative to workspace distribution of events_processed_lifetime

entityTypes.name: pipeline_cost_recommendation
entityTypes.description: An actionable cost recommendation produced by the recommender sub-agent. Reviewed by ops or routed to release-manager for implementation. Recommendations are dry-run only; this bot does not modify infrastructure.

current_metric.description: JSON blob with the actual platform-exposed metric values that triggered the rule (e.g., {days_since_last_event: 47, events_processed_lifetime: 0, sink_count: 2})

projected_savings.description: Plain-text qualitative estimate of the cost or operational benefit. Cites the sinks affected; does NOT claim dollar figures unless sink_cost_table has full coverage for the sinks involved.

suggested_action.description: Concrete one-paragraph action a human or release-manager can execute. No hype verbs.

suggested_owner.description: Bot or human role best suited to act on this recommendation

audit_id.description: ID of the pipeline_route_audit record this recommendation was derived from

last_seen_at.description: Updated each run the same finding persists

consecutive_runs_seen.description: How many runs in a row this finding has been emitted

notify_again.description: Set true after 3+ consecutive runs to re-ping executive-assistant

status.description: Operator state. Bot only writes 'open'; humans/release-manager flip to dismissed/resolved.
